action.reasoning: Observation: ViT-B/16 AugReg, 30 epochs lr=5e-5, val_acc improved to 73.4% but Quickdraw dropped to 15.45% (from 16.23% at 5 epochs lr=1e-4). Overfitting to source domains. Analysis: validation accuracy on mixed source domains does not predict Quickdraw performance; we need a better proxy (e.g., sketch accuracy on val set) and stronger regularization. Also other backbones (CLIP, DINOv2) may generalize better. Decision: Rewrite train.py with per-domain validation accuracy and save best checkpoint by sketch accuracy. Add RandAugment, RandomSolarize options. Train CLIP (ViT-B/16 from OpenAI) for 5 epochs (lr=1e-5) as baseline; submit eval. Then evaluate DINOv2 next.
